subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! Be not sorrowful, be not downcast, be not grieved in heart, be not distressed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ياران الهی محزون مباشيد مغموم مگرديد دلخون مشويد آزرده مگرديد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @episodes from the early history of Islam, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @stories; anecdotes, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
